PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-11-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Dureault in Propria Persona.

Mr. Dureault confirmed that all the Persons listed were adults. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The will was admitted into probate.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Svahlin.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Continued To Mar-11-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
